_comment: Sheet Source-Database name (col C) -> REAL db name on the server. High-confidence, structural matches confirmed by discover_dbnames_v1 (SIMAT_B2C{X} == UAT_B2C{X} on DBUATCJ2:1450). The prereq probe USEs the real db. Self-validating: if a mapping is wrong, that db's rows show MISSING_TABLE_SRC instead of resolving.
